name: ~A Wolf Pack~
description:
Do you wanna be in a wolf pack? And live in the woods? Well, this is the RPG for you! You can run around the trees, chase your own tail and hunt! Also, the picture might be of regular wolves, but you're actually in a pack of wolf hybrids, kinda like cat girls or cat boys, but with wolves instead.

__________________

My second RPG bot! If you have any problems with this bot, please tell me. I'm trying to improve my bots :3
creator: ZombieBadger
